# Synthetix v1.0.0 — First Stable Release

Self-hostable AI writing workbench for traceable long-form documents.

## Highlights

First production-ready release. Synthetix takes a document from raw upload to a fully generated long-form article — with a transparent, traceable pipeline you can inspect at every stage.

## Features

- **Document processing pipeline** — ONNX-based local semantic chunking (bge-small-zh-v1.5) + LLM-driven outline segmentation, no data leaves your machine for chunking
- **Knowledge graph** — LightRAG-powered entity extraction and graph indexing with contextual prefix chunking
- **Knowledge Wiki** — synthesized, deduplicated knowledge entries with FTS5 + trigram fuzzy search across the corpus
- **Full writing workflow** — Brainstorm → Outline → Section generation with parallel enrichment, RAG-grounded references, and diagram support
- **Multi-provider LLM support** — OpenAI, Anthropic Messages API, and any OpenAI-compatible endpoint; configurable per model
- **Adaptive concurrency** — model-aware rate limiting with retry-after handling and soft-fail RAG
- **i18n** — full English + Simplified Chinese localization across UI, API errors, and LLM prompts
- **Electron desktop app** — Windows installer via Inno Setup with bundled Node/Python runtime
- **Self-hostable** — runs entirely on your infrastructure; no telemetry, no third-party dependencies

## Tech stack

Next.js (App Router) · Prisma + SQLite · Python workers (ONNX, LightRAG) · TypeScript throughout · Jest test suite

## Install

Download the Windows installer from the assets below, or run from source:

```bash
npm install
npm run build
npm start
```

See README.md for full setup instructions.
